name: aspire-init
description: >- **WORKFLOW SKILL** - First-run flow for adding Aspire to a repo. Picks `aspire new` (greenfield) or `aspire init` (existing repo), drops the AppHost skeleton, then hands off to `aspireify` for resource wiring. USE FOR: aspire init, aspire new, aspire-starter, aspire-ts-starter, aspire-py-starter, add Aspire to existing repo, scaffold Aspire app, bootstrap Aspire, no AppHost detected, install aspireify, generated .aspire/modules. DO NOT USE FOR: AppHost wiring on an existing AppHost (use aspir
author: TimeWarpEngineering
